title: Instrumental case
subtitle: With, by means of, and expressing profession

vocabulary.exampleMeaning: The table is in front of the window.
The cat is under the table.

hook.text: The instrumental case covers two main territories: accompaniment (with someone or something) and means (using something). It's also the case for expressing profession after работать (to work as). The endings are distinctive — -ОМ/-ЕМ for masculine/neuter, -ОЙ/-ЕЙ for feminine — and they appear consistently enough to learn once and recognise everywhere.

why.text: Instrumental is required by some of the most practical prepositions in Russian: с (with), под (under), над (above), перед (in front of), между (between), за (behind). These prepositions for spatial relationships all take instrumental when describing location. Getting these right matters for giving and understanding directions.

cards.title: Instrumental singular endings
cards.body: Masculine/neuter nouns: add -ОМ (hard) or -ЕМ (soft). Feminine А/Я nouns: А→ОЙ, Я→ЕЙ. Feminine Ь nouns: Ь→ЬЮ.

examples.meaning: word → by means of the word

cards.title: с + instrumental — accompaniment
cards.body: с (with) is the most common instrumental preposition. It expresses accompaniment (being with someone) or combination (coffee with milk). Note: с reduces to со before some consonant clusters.

examples.meaning: I am going with (my) friend. (друг → другом)

cards.title: Spatial prepositions + instrumental
cards.body: When describing location (not movement), the prepositions под, над, за, перед, между all take instrumental.

cards.title: Profession — работать + instrumental
cards.body: After работать (to work), Russian uses instrumental to specify the profession. This is different from the nominative predicate (Она врач = She is a doctor — stating identity). Работать + instrumental states a professional role.

examples.meaning: She works as a doctor. (profession → instrumental)
She is a doctor. (identity statement — no case change)

questions.prompt: How do you say 'coffee with milk'?
questions.explanation: с + instrumental. молоко → молоком. кофе с молоком.

questions.prompt: The cat is under the table: Кот ___ столом.
questions.explanation: под + instrumental = under (location). кот под столом.

cards.title: Instrumental pronouns
cards.body: Personal pronouns have special instrumental forms. The third-person pronouns add Н- when used after a preposition.

examples.meaning: with us / with you (pl.) / with them

cards.title: Means and instrument
cards.body: Instrumental also expresses the means or instrument by which an action is done — without a preposition. Writing with a pen, travelling by train, paying by card. In English, 'with' or 'by' expresses this; in Russian, just the instrumental ending is enough.

questions.prompt: I am going with my sister: Я иду с ___. (сестра)
She works as a teacher: Она работает ___. (учитель — teacher)
The book is in front of the school: Книга ___ школой.
I write with a pen: Я пишу ___. (ручка)
questions.explanation: Instrument without preposition uses instrumental. ручка → ручкой.
с + instrumental = with. кофе с молоком.

rules: Location prepositions taking instrumental: под, над, перед, за, между
No preposition needed for means/instrument: Пишу ручкой (I write with a pen)
summary.nextLesson: Next: Prepositional case — location (в/на), and talking about topics (о).

questions.prompt: She works as a doctor: Она работает ___. (врач)
The cat is under the table: Кот ___ столом.
I write with a pen: Я пишу ___. (ручка)
I am going with my friend: Я иду с ___. (друг)
